title: RAG: Getting Your LLM to Read the Manual

dialogue.speaker: Len
dialogue.line: So, our new LLM knows everything, right?

dialogue.speaker: Mira
dialogue.line: LLMs generate from patterns in their vast training data, not by browsing the live internet.

dialogue.speaker: Len
dialogue.line: But it can tell me today's stock market news, instantly?

dialogue.speaker: Mira
dialogue.line: Without current data, it might generate plausible but incorrect or outdated information.

dialogue.speaker: Dot
dialogue.line: How do we get accurate, current answers from it then?

dialogue.speaker: Mira
dialogue.line: We use Retrieval Augmented Generation, which retrieves relevant facts *before* the LLM responds.

dialogue.speaker: Len
dialogue.line: So, it just... magically finds the right info?

dialogue.speaker: Mira
dialogue.line: It first queries an external knowledge base to gather context, then passes that to the LLM.

dialogue.speaker: Dot
dialogue.line: So, our internal policy bot could use this?

dialogue.speaker: Mira
dialogue.line: Exactly. RAG ensures the bot gives precise, verifiable answers based on official documents.
